trash: Trash room is on each floor near the elevator. Recycling bins are in the basement. Trash pickup is Monday and Thursday.
parking: Visitor parking is available in the rear lot. Residents can reserve spots through this portal.
roku: Roku devices are pre-configured with Netflix, Hulu, and YouTube. Use the Roku remote (black remote with purple tag). Sign in with your own accounts.
laundry: Laundry room on basement level. Coin-operated washers ($2.00) and dryers ($1.75). Available 7 AM - 10 PM daily.
mail: Mailboxes are in the lobby. Packages are held at the front desk and you will receive a notification.
house_rules: No smoking in units or common areas
No pets without prior written approval
Report maintenance issues promptly through this portal
Do not prop open building entry doors
Dispose of trash in designated areas only
